title: Stick To Diamond
description: Simple modification that transforms a stick into a diamond through crafting.
body:
# -=StickToDiamond=-
 

What does this mod add?
This mod simply turns a stick into a diamond.
 

This modification was made mainly for people who have difficulty finding diamonds.

 

Requires:
Minecraft Forge/Fabric/NeoForge (depends on the version chosen)
